programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Valentine
programme.desc: An obstetrician tried unsuccessfully to revive a man's wife who he found covered in blood.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Gold Rush
programme.desc: A man calls 911 saying his girlfriend shot herself, but the autopsy reveals that the gunshot wound was not self-inflicted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Four on the Floor
programme.desc: A Native American woman is found murdered less than 10 miles from where a male Native American was murdered two years earlier. Police begin to wonder if a serial killer is on the loose.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Prints Among Thieves
programme.desc: An eccentric millionaire who flaunted his wealth is found murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: Police fear a missing woman is the latest victim in a string of similar crimes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Elemental Clue
programme.desc: Police fear a serial killer is on the loose when two women in the same town are murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Moss Not Grass
programme.desc: A young woman is found dead on a golf course in the Bahamas, and the evidence leads police to two suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Material Witness
programme.desc: A teenager goes missing after an evening of horseback riding, and her body is found a month later, three miles from her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Garden of Evil

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday School Ambush
programme.desc: Forensic science helps investigators unravel a twisted tale of lust, greed and deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bump in the Night

programme.title: Moonshiners: Aftershock

programme.title: Moonshiners: Liquid Courage
programme.desc: Jeff and Mark reach the ultimate roadblock, and Deputy Chuck is hot on a trail. Josh and Bill might finally be back in the game. Mike takes a trip to finish off his biggest sale of the season. Tickle and crew attract unwanted attention.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Run for the Hills
programme.desc: Mark and Digger attempt to rescue a former apprentice from a moonshine calamity. An unknown competitor invades Mike's turf, forcing him to change his shine strategy. Mark and Huck bank on backwoods survival skills to fuel their high-proof run.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Say Yes to the Mess
programme.desc: Tickle announces his engagement and Tim discovers why his best friend can't quit the outlaw side. Unable to sell any shine, Mike attempts a long-distance bootleg that puts him in the crosshairs of the law. Josh bets that Sin City needs one more vice.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Outlaw Cuts: Murphy's Law for Outlaws
programme.desc: With Extra Shine and bonus scenes: Tickle and Tim fire up their first backwoods run in a decade, Mark and Digger begin their own operation and Josh's entire operation is threatened after a minor oversight.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fear at First Bite
programme.desc: Dropping temperatures force Dusty and the team to change hunting strategies, but a run-in with his old rival Cowboy throws the team off the trail.

programme.title: #TeamPluto
programme.desc: In 2006, Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet. YouTube star and TV host Nick Uhas and a team of esteemed scientists on the quest to understand the fierce fascination with Pluto's planetary standing.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Game of Bones and Unknowns
programme.desc: Josh explores the beauty of the spiritual realm. He investigates a German basilica said to house the bones of 11,000 virgins, a Japanese ice cave guarded by a dragon's spirit and a remote island where cats outnumber humans.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Rolling Down the Mountain
programme.desc: A young outlaw with an old pot still earns an apprenticeship with Mark and Digger. Mountain man Mark tackles a week-long run to hit an $18K order that includes special delivery. In a desperate attempt to fix his worm barrel, Josh dives in headfirst.

programme.title: Guardians of the Glades: Fear at First Bite
programme.desc: Dropping temperatures force Dusty and the team to change hunting strategies, but a run-in with his old rival Cowboy throws the team off the trail.

programme.title: #TeamPluto
programme.desc: In 2006, Pluto was reclassified as a dwarf planet. YouTube star and TV host Nick Uhas and a team of esteemed scientists on the quest to understand the fierce fascination with Pluto's planetary standing.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Game of Bones and Unknowns
programme.desc: Josh explores the beauty of the spiritual realm. He investigates a German basilica said to house the bones of 11,000 virgins, a Japanese ice cave guarded by a dragon's spirit and a remote island where cats outnumber humans.

programme.title: Moonshiners: Moonshiners: The Legend of Jim Tom
programme.desc: The name Jim Tom is synonymous with moonshine. Between run-ins with the law and serving hard labour, he spent 60 years making illegal shine.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Vocation, Vocation, Vocation
programme.desc: From the ultimate samurai smack down in 17th-century Japan to a young author who found inspiration for his most terrifying tale in Boston, Josh Gates highlights five locations where people's passions were transformed into lasting legacies.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Out of This World
programme.desc: Josh shares five locations where the natural and supernatural worlds can be explored, including a haunted asylum in upstate New York and an underground cathedral built entirely of salt in Poland.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Rock and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Josh explores stories of perseverance, including a tragic Salem witch trial case that led to a lasting change in the United States justice system and an old Mexican folk tale that's still celebrated in a festival today.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: End of the World
programme.desc: From a secret underground government bunker to a town that miraculously survived a tsunami, Josh explores five locations where the end of the world was just the beginning.

programme.title: Legendary Locations: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: From a tense standoff near the Berlin Wall at the height of the Cold War to an Arizona prison where an unlikely outlaw finagled her freedom, Josh Gates explores five legendary locations where fight or flight were the only options.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Bocas Del Toro
programme.desc: Max and Bianca face off with aggressive caiman, boa constrictors, large spiders, and thorny mangroves in this Superfan challenge on a tropical island in Panama.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Namibia Round Two
programme.desc: We follow mountain man Joe, and former cop Andrea as they take on Namibia. Fun and interesting factoids pop up as they attempt to survive in this vast land that's home to dangerous predators, including the deadly hippopotamus.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Jaguar Jungle
programme.desc: One survivalist falls into a roaring fire after weeks of depleted energy due to no food. With just days to go, the pair makes a daring plan to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Nicaragua
programme.desc: The latest Pop Up edition sheds new light on Adam and Jaclyn's adventure in Nicaragua. Primarily, can a hunter and a vegetarian survive together in the snake-infested mountains of this Central American country?

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Mexico Island
programme.desc: In this pop up edition, fun and interesting factoids appear as two fan survivalists are dropped on Mexico's unforgiving, cenote-covered island filled with venomous coral snakes, territorial jaguars, blood-sucking chiquistas.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Guyana Jungle
programme.desc: Travel to the jungles of Guyana, where the two survivalists have two different priorities. Fun and interesting factoids pop up as starvation sets in causing tension to rise. See if they can come together to survive.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Nothing Ordinary Here
programme.desc: Erin wants a blue dress for her destination wedding, but she must first convince her skeptical entourage. Kate is in search of a unique dress that incorporates colour. Heather's entourage is shocked when she proudly shows off her flower-patterned gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: If You've Got it, Flaunt It
programme.desc: Kia is a pro-basketball player embracing her height, as she looks for the perfect long dress for her six-inch heels. Comedian Christie looks for a dress to show off what her mama gave her. Queen Precious has lost 100 pounds and hopes her dress still fits.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: A Gown Worth the Trip
programme.desc: With Alaska coming up short on dress options, Liz has flown 4,000 miles and must find something. Norwegian Amanda has exhausted all options in Europe, with high hopes for the salon. After losing 18 pounds, Danielle worries her gown won't show her curves.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: No Room for Compromise
programme.desc: Petite bride Christine is looking for a gown to match her '20s theme-inspired wedding. Stefanny wants a sexy dress to wear on her big day, but her parents have other ideas. Valentina returns for her fitting to add a personal touch to her gown.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: America: Ring That Bell
programme.desc: After shocking a bride at work, Randy struggles with the famous local cuisine. Bria has regrets about her entourage and Randell finally gets to wear her custom Hayley Paige jumpsuit down the aisle.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney Meets the Parents
programme.desc: When Chase takes Whitney home to West Virginia to meet his family, she fears they won't accept her. But the couple fights when he doesn't want her to leave early for Buddy's comedy show. And Chase's sister puts Whitney on the spot about having kids.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Drinking Buddy
programme.desc: Whitney worries for her parents' safety after her dad falls down the stairs. Buddy discovers he must make amends to Whitney for his recovery. Ryan and Chase throw Whitney a party, but Chase is jealous when Whitney leaves to take a call from Buddy.

programme.title: I Am Jazz: I'm Still Standing
programme.desc: Jazz heads to New York for a consultation on a possible 4th surgery with Dr. Ting. She then takes the time to make an appearance on a reality show and faces off against trans deniers.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Why Not One House?
programme.desc: Janelle moves (again!) to be closer to her Sister Wives. Kody won't let go of his dream to live all under one roof but the wives can't agree to do it. Robyn wonders if they have failed as polygamists if they can't live together.

programme.title: My Big Fat Fabulous Life: Whitney Meets the Parents

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: 16-Minute Weeknight Dinners
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is exploring 16-minute marvels with four awesome weeknight dinners cooked against the clock. She makes pork schnitzel sandwiches topped with warm red cabbage followed by a snappy Italian sausage pasta skillet.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Best of Perfect One Pan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond has collected her best one-pan recipes, starting with no-fuss Lemon Basil Shrimp Risotto made in one skillet. She uses a multipurpose pasta pot for insanely good Loaded Veggie Pasta.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Triple D Takes on Triple G
programme.desc: Chefs from Diners, Drive-in and Dives meet under Guy's roof for a culinary show down. Radishes and maple syrup are ingredients the chefs must use.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: American Heroes
programme.desc: Four American heroes - a cop, a firefighter, an EMT and an Air Force vet - test their culinary might in a battle worth up to $20,000. First, the heroes are inspired by legendary rapper-turned-judge Rev Run to "wok this way," using a wok to shop.

programme.title: Guy's Grocery Games: Culinary Saved My Life
programme.desc: Four chefs who have overcome life's adversities by following their culinary dreams compete to become a Triple G winner. First, they toast their success with a celebratory dinner that incorporates Guy Fieri's red light special: hot dogs.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Texas-Sized Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew saddle up and ride on down to Leakey, TX, to build a colossal, Texas-sized treehouse. He rounds-up 'the magnificent seven' of cypresses alongside the banks of the Frio River and builds a treehouse with the longest bridge in NT&S history.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Apres Skihouse Treehouse
programme.desc: Pete designs a ski chalet treehouse that glistens as bright as the freshest powder atop a black diamond run. The 20-ft high winter retreat comes complete with a secret bedroom and a double-sided fireplace to keep guests warm both inside and out.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Frank Lloyd Lakehouse
programme.desc: Pete and the crew channel Frank Lloyd Wright for a triple-decker treehouse on the shores of Lake Barkley in Kentucky.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Jeffersonian Honeymoon Suite
programme.desc: Pete and his patriots descend upon Virginia for the first time to bring the treehouse revolution to Bella Rose Plantation. Drawing on the architectural innovations of Thomas Jefferson, Pete designs a luxurious two-story treehouse with colonial columns.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Peace, Love and Trees
programme.desc: Pete embraces his inner hippie when he builds a couple a staycation spot with a hammock high above the trees. Later, Pete returns to Utopia, Texas, for a couple who desires a French-themed chapel B and B with a towering steeple.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Bird Barn Treehouse
programme.desc: Two retirees get a retreat on their 100-acre Wisconsin farm. Pete builds a barn-like birdhouse with three separate pods including an art studio, an office, and a lounge complete with a screened porch and a deck overlooking their stable of alpacas.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hill Country Hideout
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country. Six live oak trees are used to create rustic perfection with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Branched Out: Peace, Love and Trees
programme.desc: Pete embraces his inner hippie when he builds a couple a staycation spot with a hammock high above the trees. Later, Pete returns to Utopia, Texas, for a couple who desires a French-themed chapel B and B with a towering steeple.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: The Bird Barn Treehouse
programme.desc: Two retirees get a retreat on their 100-acre Wisconsin farm. Pete builds a barn-like birdhouse with three separate pods including an art studio, an office, and a lounge complete with a screened porch and a deck overlooking their stable of alpacas.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Hill Country Hideout
programme.desc: Pete and his gang ride out to the Lone Star State to build a double-decker hideout in Texas Hill Country. Six live oak trees are used to create rustic perfection with a saloon-style first floor for sippin' sarsaparilla and a glass floor for views below.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Off-the-Grid Getaway
programme.desc: Pete creates an off-the-grid escape that's all about peace, love, and treehouses. The NTS crew builds a stunning treehouse made from repurposed materials, while the client adds a massive 'dream net' hammock in the trees.

programme.title: Treehouse Masters: Treehouse Utopia
programme.desc: Pete partners up in Utopia, TX for his first-ever joint venture: a treehouse B&B built for romance.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Forces of Nature
programme.desc: Steve joins the U.S. military for a wild experience on the flightline in F-15s and F-16s. He works with the Rangers to remove venomous snakes from harm's way.

programme.title: Too Cute!: Kittens and Canines
programme.desc: A litter of orphaned kittens trail a pair of Dandy Dinmont Terriers. The only girl in a litter of four American Bobtails hunts for her place in the pack. Finally, a naughty Tonkinese kitten proves a handful for her prim and proper mom.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Bully Cat
programme.desc: Jackson comes to the aid of a couple afraid to have a child for fear of their aggressive cat, Martini. He must also try to keep the peace between a pair of cats whose battleground is often the kitty litter.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Lucky Break
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff helps a dog with a serious illness. Mel and her daughter rescue a baby squirrel, while Dr. Jeff and Dr. Petra team up to save a beloved cat hit by a car. Dr. Baier gives a rabbit owner a surprise and a tiny dog with a big spirit needs a home.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Wedding Day Blues
programme.desc: Dr. Blue surprises his wife with a romantic wedding vow renewal in Las Vegas. A Schnauzer boarding at the clinic needs medical help from Dr. Lavigne. Dr. Ross treats a very ornery parrot, and a senior dog with a recurring eye mass visits Dr. Blue again.

programme.title: The Zoo: San Diego: Miracle Calf
programme.desc: Southern white rhino Victoria is pregnant with a calf that could be a key in saving a species from extinction. Connor the Malayan tiger has tooth trouble. A new bird keeper learns to feed the shoebill. Polar bears use their hunting skills on live prey.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Tough Love
programme.desc: Blue Poison dart frog Bertha loves to wrestle. The zoo would like to breed her, but she's scared off all potential suitors. The keeps introduce some new young male frogs, in hope that one of them will be strong enough.

programme.title: The Zoo: Back to Africa
programme.desc: Zoo staff make the journey to east Africa to return to the wild thousands of toads they helped rescue from extinction. Utu, the test-pilot giraffe, tries out a new piece of equipment. And the bird department works to save the lives of millions of birds.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: City of Second Chances
programme.desc: A mother and son travel from Boston with hopes of adopting a dog, but Tia struggles to find a good fit for the family. Lizzy rescues a maggot-covered dog that was found lying on the road and races to the vet, hoping to save her.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Home at Last
programme.desc: Villalobos' oldest resident, Summer, a pit with severe arthritis, has a chance at a forever home. Earl works to improve a dog's social skills, hoping to make him more adoptable. And Kanani's girlfriend, M2, takes on her first rescue.

programme.title: Movie: Megachurch Murder
programme.desc: After a charismatic megachurch leader commits suicide, his teenage daughter finds evidence pointing towards a conspiracy and threats. As she gets closer to the truth, she realizes her mother and her boyfriend's father may be involved.

programme.title: Movie: Blue Streak
programme.desc: A jewel thief is released from jail and sets out to find his hidden loot. However, when he returns to his hiding spot he finds the area has been turned into a police station and his only shot of recovering the diamonds is to impersonate a detective.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnap
programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Movie: The Single Moms Club

programme.title: Unearthed: Rome's Great Wall
programme.desc: Hadrian's Wall was built to guard the frontiers of the ancient Roman Empire. Now, discoveries reveal who the Romans were trying to keep out with this 72-mile-long megastructure, and what it tells us about the ancient people of Iron Age Britain.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Kingdom of Kush
programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: Unearthed: Hunt for the First Pyramid
programme.desc: A strange site called Saqqara is home to Egypt's very first pyramid, and here, experts use cutting-edge tech to reveal why the ancient Egyptians started building pyramids and if the mummified animals found here are evidence of a bizarre religious cult.

programme.title: Unearthed: Alcatraz's Hidden Secrets
programme.desc: Alcatraz is home to secrets that only cutting-edge archaeology can reveal, and using the latest science and the newest tech, experts search for hidden evidence to investigate why so many tried and failed to escape America's toughest jail.

programme.title: Unearthed: Mysteries of the Lost Cities
programme.desc: New discoveries are revealing the secrets of the great lost cities of the ancient world, and using hi-tech archaeological methods, experts investigate why the marvels of these once prosperous civilizations now lie in ruin.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Nightmare
programme.desc: Investigators follow a trail of fresh evidence to uncover the strange truth behind the man who was head of the Nazi killing machine, and why he ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost City of the Desert
programme.desc: The ancient city of Petra, a city carved from desert rock, has baffled experts for decades. Now, new technologies resurrect the city and reveal why the spectacular civilization was suddenly abandoned.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Nazi Nightmare
programme.desc: Investigators follow a trail of fresh evidence to uncover the strange truth behind the man who was head of the Nazi killing machine, and why he ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Aliens in the Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle. Using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Unearthed: Lost Kingdom of Kush
programme.desc: Pyramids in the deserts of Sudan are the ruins of a powerful lost civilization that rivaled the pharaohs of ancient Egypt, and using cutting-edge tech and archaeological methods, experts are revealing the secrets behind the mysterious Kingdom of Kush.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler: Suicide or Survivor
programme.desc: Explore the mystery on whether Adolf Hitler died in a bunker under Berlin at the end of the Second World War. It seems unlikely, but he could have escaped to Argentina with his wife Eva Braun, where they lived out the rest of their lives in Patagonia.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: Bloodlust: Real Vampires
programme.desc: From Bram Stoker's 1897 novel to the rise of the undead in popular culture, Vampires have caught our attention in recent decades. We travel to Bulgaria to investigate claims of a real Vampire burial and examine accounts of vampires.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Top Secret Nazi UFOs
programme.desc: Investigating claims that the Nazis had developed a brand new flying craft at a secret research facility in Northern Germany and that the Americans and Russians stole this technology after the war.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Female Forces: Ready to Rumble
programme.desc: The women of Naperville PD show just how tough they are as they combat out of control suspects including a kid who tries to charge one of the officers and a mother with a violent daughter seeking advice.

programme.title: Female Forces: Breaking in the Rookie
programme.desc: Rookie officer Sara Rolfe completes her police training and gets a surprise visit from Betsy and Julie when they drop by the academy to check on her progress. Sara then gets a taste of real police work when she goes on patrol.

programme.title: Female Forces: Cry Me a River
programme.desc: Plenty of tears are shed by suspects and officers; Betsy escorts a war veteran.

programme.title: Female Forces: Red Alert
programme.desc: Betsy, Julie and Tracy release some aggression and train for hand-to-hand combat with their nightstick batons. Officer Dawn Yorke deals with a belligerent homeless man accused of casing a parking lot for possible theft.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Victim's Revenge
programme.desc: The team finds that a young girl's suicide in 1916 could have been a murder and that her aggressor is still hanging around the campus hoping to find his next victim.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: CPD are called in by the Frankfort Fire Department to investigate strange occurrences in the firehouse.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Meagan's Ghost
programme.desc: A concerned homeowner contacts CPD when her houseguest is choked in her sleep by an unseen force.

programme.title: Paranormal Cops: Messages from Beyond
programme.desc: A police officer calls Ron to help him uncover the mysteries surrounding his night job as a security officer at a banquet hall.

programme.title: Female Forces: Irish Luck
programme.desc: St. Patrick's Day evening is the perfect backdrop as zany suspects take center stage, including a belligerent drunk woman who continuously bangs her head in an attempt to cause herself bodily harm.

programme.desc: A drunken male suspect gets a little rough; a public indecency suspect causes trouble.

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: American Justice: The Monster Inside
programme.desc: In a controversial case, rapist Rex Allen Krebs was found guilty of murder in 2001.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Those We Rely On
programme.desc: It's an emotional night on the Nightwatch in New Orleans as one EMS officer tells his partner that this is their last night on the job.

programme.title: Nightwatch Nation: The Sober Truth
programme.desc: In Austin, Luddy and Finch practice parking lot medicine when they respond to a heroin overdose on a 19-year-old patient. Niki and Nicole show their compassionate side to a young woman suffering from an emotional trauma in Baton Rouge.

programme.title: Model Killers: Finger-Licking Good/ Slaying of a Tennessee Beauty Queen
programme.desc: A woman meets the perfect man to launch her modeling career, but is soon faced with a brutal reality. A beautiful farm girl moves to the city to pursue her modeling dreams, but winds up living a nightmare.

programme.title: Model Killers: Reality Kills
programme.desc: Three passionate, attractive men - and some very adoring fans - lust after a swimsuit model with a heart of gold.

programme.title: Model Killers: Model Murderer/ Strangled Beauty
programme.desc: An ambitious male model with a physique to die for is about to become an international sensation -- but not in a way he could have foreseen.

programme.title: Grace vs. Abrams: Casey Anthony
programme.desc: Nancy Grace and Dan Abrams take a deeper look at the case and uncover new information relevant to the trial.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Mission: Proof
programme.desc: Lizzie Welsh, the youngest of a tight-knit family, is killed in a tragic trucking accident, leaving behind her young son Conner. Now Lizzie's brother-in-law Gary believes her death was no accident, and that Conner may be next to die.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: A Fire Inside
programme.desc: When a serial arsonist murders four people in a California hardware store, fire investigators Marvin Casey and John Orr both become obsessed with the case. As fires continue to burn across the state, the two are pushed to their limits to stop the killing.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: Killer Colleagues
programme.desc: Zoe Pulver and Jane Long have great jobs working for Ashley Pollow, a talented tax attorney in Florida. But Ashley also has a violent temper, and when a grisly murder takes place at the office, Jane and Zoe find themselves way too close to the killer.

programme.title: Deadly Secrets: The Truth Hurts
programme.desc: A man is caught up in deception and lies after an affair with another man's wife. Two men will die and a family will be torn apart. An older brother and uncle do what they can to uncover who the killer is.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Stuck in the Middle
programme.desc: When Paula Cardwell returns from running errands, she finds her 20-year-old daughter, Anna Catherine, lying dead on the kitchen floor. The small town of Wetumpka, Alabama, is left stunned and determined to find the devil in their midst.

programme.title: Body Cam: Flight Risk
programme.desc: In Georgia, a suspected drug dealer won't go down without a fight. In Ohio, police fear for their lives when faced with an ambush from a hidden gunman. After a high-speed chase, a fleeing driver has one more surprise for Macomb County Deputies.

programme.title: Body Cam: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Arkansas officers are pinned down by a deadly gunman for four hours. Then, in Oklahoma City, officers fear an ambush when a suspect bails from a stolen pick-up truck.

programme.title: Murder Comes Home: Stuck in the Middle
programme.desc: When Paula Cardwell returns from running errands, she finds her 20-year-old daughter, Anna Catherine, lying dead on the kitchen floor. The small town of Wetumpka, Alabama, is left stunned and determined to find the devil in their midst.

programme.title: Body Cam: Flight Risk
programme.desc: In Georgia, a suspected drug dealer won't go down without a fight. In Ohio, police fear for their lives when faced with an ambush from a hidden gunman. After a high-speed chase, a fleeing driver has one more surprise for Macomb County Deputies.

programme.title: Body Cam: In the Crosshairs
programme.desc: Arkansas officers are pinned down by a deadly gunman for four hours. Then, in Oklahoma City, officers fear an ambush when a suspect bails from a stolen pick-up truck.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: American Monster: Appalachian Horror Film
programme.desc: Brian and Randi Trimble are in the throes of newly married life. But when Brian meets the fun-loving Blaine Norris at work, their friendship over Blaine's low-budget horror film takes a dark turn.

programme.title: Killer Unknown: Find the Girl
programme.desc: America's finest come out of retirement to crack 31 cold cases of Tulsa County opening two of the most notorious murders: 16-year-old Dena Dean, abducted and murdered in 1998, and 38 year old Veda Woodson, raped and murdered on a deserted road in 1973.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Under My Thumb
programme.desc: From the womb, the Cormier twins are partners in mischief. But as they get older, their innocent antics devolve into a much darker game. Soon, the battle for reality and fantasy bleeds into real life threatening to tear the twins apart.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: Identical twins Yvette and Doris Gay are a close-knit pair, but when they meet Renwick Gibbs, their quiet duo transforms into a dangerous threesome. And soon they with devise a murderous scheme that will change one innocent family's life forever.

programme.title: Evil Twins: Sacrificial Lamb
programme.desc: Gretchen and Gloria survived a terrible childhood. Gloria goes on to lead a happy life, while Gretchen turns to drugs and prostitution. Tragically, both twins participate in a house fire that causes a horrific death and leads to twin-on-twin betrayal.

programme.title: 48 Hours: A Student of Murder
programme.desc: The death of a Seattle wine steward driving home puts the city on edge. The murder grabbed headlines and the attention of the city's commuters. Investigators need to determine if this was a random act of road rage or just a killer looking for kicks.

programme.title: 48 Hours Mystery: The Killing Fields
programme.desc: A Hollywood movie tries to solve the most notorious killing spree in Texas.

programme.title: 48 Hours: Find Jodi
programme.desc: More than two decades after an Iowa TV anchor disappeared, '48 Hours' reveals new information into the investigation.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Slaying Season
programme.desc: When a single mother of three misses a routine bank run with her sister, panic begins to spread among the family. The family's nightmare becomes a reality when a passerby finds the beloved petite woman brutally assaulted, nude, and frozen in an alley.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Open Season
programme.desc: On a frigid fall evening, a hunter in Missouri is found shot to death. Freak hunting accident or cold and calculating homicide? As the mysterious case unfolds, police uncover a web of infidelity and lies, leading to the least likely of suspects.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen in Fear
programme.desc: A pedestrian check turns deadly when a cop is gunned down on a midnight patrol. The attacker flees with the officer's squad car...and her weapon. The stakes are higher than ever as investigators try to capture the person who killed one of their own.

programme.title: Ice Cold Killers: Frozen Innocence
programme.desc: On a chilly winter morning in St. Louis, an eleven year old girl vanishes. Days later her body is found along an icy river bank. She's been brutally murdered. It's a race against time for investigators who fear the elusive killer will strike again.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Stalin: Russia's Steel Tyrant
programme.desc: For 30 years, Joseph Stalin rules the Soviet Union with an iron fist. Anyone who stands in his way will be destroyed.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Mao: China's Chairman of Death
programme.desc: Mao Zedong, Supreme Leader of Communist China for 30 years, is one of the 20th Century's most ruthless tyrants. His reign of cruelty and revenge, transforms him to a position of authority so great, his personality cult remains to this day.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Baghdad: Thunder Runs
programme.desc: In what would become one of the most brutal and decisive battles of the Iraq war, a battalion of tanks punches a hole right into the heart of Saddam Hussein's Baghdad in 2003. They are the first Mechanised force to enter a capitol city since WWII.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Kandahar: Against All Odds
programme.desc: 36 U.S Special Forces face a Taliban insurgence 5 times their size. Facing I.E.Ds , RPG's and vicious counter attacks, they fight for their lives to take the hill of Sperwan Ghar, as control of the hill is control of Kandahar.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Fallujah: The Taking of Terror Central
programme.desc: Operation Phantom Fury was meant to be a 48 hour battle but insurgents, armed with IEDs and a stockpile of grenades, fought back. US forces faced one of the toughest urban conflicts since Vietnam as they tried to reclaim the city.

programme.title: Ultimate Warfare: Khe Sanh: Marines Under Siege
programme.desc: Six thousand outnumbered marines fight for survival against a vast, highly trained Communist army in a bloody 77 day siege. It's a battle that will shape the course of the war in Vietnam.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Bin Laden: A Terrorist Mastermind
programme.desc: See how Osama bin Laden's journey unfolds from his roots as a privileged young Saudi boy to becoming the formidable leader of al-Qaeda, and his lifetime commitment to violent jihad against the West. This resulted in the horrific 9/11 attacks in 2001.

programme.title: Evolution of Evil: Saddam: The Butcher of Baghdad
programme.desc: The story of Saddam Hussein, the sadistic tyrant who ruled Iraq with an utter contempt for humanity for 23 years, a man whose cruelty knows no limits and who'll stop at nothing to achieve the power of life and death over millions of people.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: U-Boat Terror
programme.desc: The global reach of the war reveals itself, as the incredible stories of those at sea are heard. Relentless attacks by U-Boats push the British to develop new strategies to defeat this evil empire.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Bombing the Reich
programme.desc: Devastation touches the civilians of Germany. With the U.S. as a newly engaged Ally, western forces bring the war to the Axis front, but at extreme costs.

programme.title: WWII in the Pacific: Waking the Beast
programme.desc: On December 7, 1941 Japan gambles all and attacks the US. In the first months of the war it looks as though Japan is unbeatable until the US fights back. The War in the Pacific engulfs Asia and launches an entirely new form of naval warfare.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War, Hot War
programme.desc: A look at the crucial events of the 1960s: U.S. troops in Vietnam, the USSR's warheads in Cuba and the moon landing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Bullet Points: America's First War on Communism
programme.desc: Five years after the end of World War Two, the Cold War turns hot when America faces two communist giants in Korea and succeeds in keeping tyranny in check.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Battle for the Pacific
programme.desc: See how America recovered from Pearl Harbor and, in one year, achieved supremacy in the Pacific over the Japanese empire. Featuring highlights of the defining battles that turned the tide in the Pacific theater and led to victory.

programme.title: Bullet Points: Showdown in the Middle East
programme.desc: From 1948 to 1973 the Arabs and Israelis went to war five times for territory in the holy land of Palestine. See the key operations in one of the longest ongoing conflicts in world history.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Boneyard Makeover
programme.desc: The team transforms the Boneyard by enclosing part of their shed with walls so they can work year-round, finishing off their new workspace by covering one wall with multi-colored barn wood.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Tennessee Treasure
programme.desc: The crew rebuilds the Minor Hill cabin in Franklin, Tennessee. Mark Bowe checks out a log cabin addition to an 1806 stone home and then tours a local whiskey distillery built inside a timber-frame barn.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Barnwood Gold Mine
programme.desc: The builders salvage a variety of barnwood off an Ohio barn, but to save it all, they have to deal with a dangerous roof. Mark finds a flooring company with a new idea for old wood and later visits an incredible timber frame home.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hidden History
programme.desc: The crew saves an Ohio barn built with incredible craftsmanship and Mark scouts another barn that turns out to be a keeper. Later, he visits a massive timber-frame barn that was perfectly restored on its original site and converted into a restaurant.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Montana Mountaintop
programme.desc: A couple builds their off-grid dream home on a remote mountaintop overlooking the Southwest Montana backcountry. Together they've dreamed up a mountain base camp that's high tech and suits their outdoor lifestyle.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Vermont Stone House
programme.desc: Novice builder Danny Clark attempts to construct a 600-square-foot stone cabin in Vermont's White River Valley. The home is sure to be a true work of art but his inexperience, the harsh winter and the unusual architecture push him to his limits.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Lake Superior Lodge
programme.desc: A couple races to finish a modern, off-grid lodge overlooking the south shores of Lake Superior.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Love Yurts: A Nautical Yurt
programme.desc: A couple with a love for the ocean is looking for a yurt, and Nathan and Jenny are up to the task. The build schedule is put at risk, however, when Jenny loses her voice and rain pours in while the yurt goes up.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: A Bold Move
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps his son MJ renovate his tiny bungalow so he and his girlfriend Lisa can have a place of their own to start a family. MJ's modest renovation plans are turned upside down by Mike's ambitious plans to gut the house and add a second storey.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Moving Up in the World
programme.desc: Cracks in the foundation put a dent in MJ's hot tub dreams, while Mike tries to keep the focus on structure as the second floor walls go up. MJ decides not to tarp the house before a heavy rain, dampening both Mike's mood and the wood beneath his feet.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Decisions, Decisions ...
programme.desc: The crew focuses on the exterior envelope of the home until illness hits the crew forcing Mike to leave the job site, which opens the door for MJ to make some important structural decisions without his dad.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Distractions and Disagreements
programme.desc: Tensions run high as Mike and MJ engage in a revolving door of disagreements over hardwood flooring, exterior brick, and a lively debate about dishwashers. MJ's nerves are frayed as he prepares to ask Lisa an important question.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Trouble at the Finish
programme.desc: It's the finishing stages, but the end is not in sight for MJ, as he runs into financial setbacks, tiling troubles with Lisa, and door debates with his dad. As tensions mount, MJ must come to a decision that has repercussions for the completion.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Holmes Sweet Home
programme.desc: Emotions are high as MJ delivers his custom table to an unsuspecting friend. Then, after months in the making, it's all Holmes on deck as everyone pitches in for the final push to complete the house before the big reveal.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Salvaging Items From Columbus, Ohio Into Repurposed Goods
programme.desc: The guys tackle disassembling a 40 foot Eiffel Tower replica in Columbus. While there, they meet a fellow salvager and pick through his collection. Grayson also builds a floor lamp with salvaged materials back at the warehouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Reel Theatres
programme.desc: The crew salvages a movie theater, and find analog projectors, neon letters and more.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Laverock Hill Estate
programme.desc: The crew heads to Glenside, PA to salvage a huge estate. The sprawling mansion gives the Dawgs a run for their money as they try to save columns, doors, mantles, bathtubs and more. Mike and Tay visit Rural Retreat to find a piece for a coffee table.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Peanut Silo Salvage
programme.desc: The crew score some doors from the Virginia Military Institute before hesitantly taking on a Peanut Silo Salvage in Virginia. After a precarious roof removal they devise a plan to dismantle the silos while keeping them intact.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To The Ferry
programme.desc: The team returns to the Norfolk, VA, ferry to get the large items that were left behind, including a crow's nest and staircase.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return To K-Town
programme.desc: Mike and Tay build a commemorative clock for the town of Kannapolis, North Carolina, before the crew heads back to salvage items left behind on the first trip, including a large cupola, windows and a bank vault.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Swine Dining
programme.desc: Roger Mooking heads to the Liberty Kitchen in Houston, Texas, where Chef Lance Fegen has built a monster wood-fired Argentinian grill. Roger and Lance prepare a traditional Balinese pig roast by spit-roasting it over bold mesquite coals.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Generations Of Smoke
programme.desc: Barbecue is in the blood at two family-run institutions where the dedication for perfecting smoked meats spans decades.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Out Of This World Bbq
programme.desc: Roger meets a pit master with a PhD who cooks Carolina-style whole hog barbecue in Louisiana. Dr. Howard Conyers is an engineer for NASA by day, but a pit master at night.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fueling The Fires In Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking's quest for lip-smacking smoked meat leads him back to the Lone Star State. In Houston, Texas, Grant Pinkerton is an award-winning pit master who recently opened up his first restaurant.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Steak
programme.desc: In the culinary world of signature meals, nothing else compares to the sensory experience of steak.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Hidden Treasures
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country for Man's Greatest Food.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast
programme.desc: Nick Lachey hooks up with Michael Symon in Philadelphia, one of the best beer cities in the country with a food scene to match. From Chef Jose Garces' over-the-top bourbon burger, to true German smoked sausages.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City
programme.desc: Anthony Anderson hooks up with Michael Symon to discover some of the city's legendary food institutions for sensational smoke sausages and indulgent burgers.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Bayou Barbecue and Saucy Skillets
programme.desc: Michael Symon starts in Las Vegas, Nev., with a skillet full of pork belly chili and a mega-pancake that's the ultimate collision of apple pie and brunch.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Atlanta, Ga
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary crusade brings him to Atlanta for a decadent doughnut brunch, beastly barbecue and a five-pound mountain of tater tot nachos.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Palm Springs, CA
programme.desc: Casey Webb's cross-country culinary quest takes him back in time to Palm Springs, California, where he comes face-to-face with a three-pound skyscraper of a sandwich loaded with every deli meat imaginable.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Kansas City, Missouri
programme.desc: Casey Webb travels to Kansas City, Missouri in order to challenge three-pound almond butter and jelly sandwich known as the Elvis Challenge, a four-meat pizza with a tater top topper and a brisket sandwich piled high.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Omaha, Nebraska
programme.desc: Casey Webb heads to Omaha to satisfy his hunger in the heartland. He chows down on a historic Reuben sandwich, a soul food feast featuring fried chicken from a 100-year-old recipe.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Phenomenal Philly Food Feast

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Salty and Smoky in the Windy City

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Far East Meats Wild West
programme.desc: In Las Vegas, Nev., Michael Symon tackles towering burgers piled with spicy Korean pork bulgogi and juicy pork belly pastrami. In Denver, a modern-day sloppy joe is loaded with iconic brisket burnt ends. Finally, a fusion spot in Tulsa serves lamb-chili.

programme.desc: Grace is a Southern belle with a high fashion sense engaged to Jeremy, a down-home Georgia boy. With so much to plan, the cake seems to be the largest of their worries. Grace wants an over-the-top cake with a dazzling amount of sparkle.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Carnival Dreams
programme.desc: Mike and Miranda have always shared a love of fun and are planning a carnival-themed wedding, an homage to their first date, but the cake design is still up in the air.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: No Cakes on Deck
programme.desc: With just a few weeks until Geoff and Brittany's wedding the couple still can't agree on their perfect cake.

programme.title: Cake Hunters: Twice as Nice

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Surprise Filled Cakes
programme.desc: A rancher's birthday party calls for a pair of larger-than-life cowboy boots. Next, the Texas Reptile Zoo celebrates with a realistic snake cake that blows everyone's mind. Finally, two special cakes are filled with hidden surprises.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Jaw-Dropping Fantasy Cakes
programme.desc: A baker takes on a cake of Jurassic proportions for a group of movie super fans, and a 30th birthday calls for an elaborate dessert that brings a woodland creature to life.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Gravity-Defying Musical Cakes
programme.desc: A 50s-themed cake with a working jukebox is music to everyone's ears and an out-of-this-world wedding cake gets filled with hand-sculpted edible zombies! Next, an alligator groom's cake looks like it crawled right out of the swamp.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Massive Mega Cakes

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Colorful Candies

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Local Legends
programme.desc: Alfonso takes you on a tour of local legends, from Tennessee's iconic Jack Daniel's Whiskey to the Fannie May factory in Ohio where sweet Buckeyes are made. He also finds out how a novel mix of hard candy and gum became the Charms Blow Pop.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Tongue Twister

programme.title: Our Cartoon President: Fox News

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Going for Broke
programme.desc: A Russian immigrant stockbroker is found dead and a strange phone call to his office is the only clue investigators have to go on - until they're led to a client who's made some bad investments, and a dog that sheds a little more than his owner realized.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Just Desserts
programme.desc: A Florida couple is found dead just days before their planned move out of state. A known criminal's driver's license found at the crime scene seems too good to be true.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sunday's Wake
programme.desc: When a little girl got sick and died, investigators were stumped. Scientists would travel half-way around the world before finding the answer in two unlikely places.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Dreams
programme.desc: A car is discovered in a drainage ditch with two bullet-riddled bodies inside, and a fingerprint from a latex glove provides key evidence investigators need to determine where the crime took place as well as the identity of the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Gambler
programme.desc: To solve a case of triple homicide, investigators have to delve into the world of high rollers and offshore betting. With the help of forensics, they are able to bring down a killer who gambled, and lost.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Weakest Link
programme.desc: There are no clues to identify a body found along a rural road. Even after a determined detective finds the 'key' to identifying her, it takes a close analysis of a tire tread and a broken piece of jewellery to bring her killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Capitol Crimes
programme.desc: Police suspect a man in a hit and run, but he leased the car in question to someone in another state. Police found the vehicle and took it apart, uncovering evidence telling them just what happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Undertaken
programme.desc: The medical examiner ruled the death an accident, but the detectives investigating the case thought the evidence at the scene indicated otherwise. It would take three years, an exhumation and a second autopsy to determine who was right.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dark Waters
programme.desc: Investigators face the daunting task of searching for one boat among many others after a hit-and-run boating accident caused the death of a young man. Detectives hope witnesses to the accident can help them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Nice Threads
programme.desc: A woman was found dead on the bedroom floor of her apartment. The crime scene yielded little of value, and investigators wondered if they would find enough evidence to make a case, much less catch a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Live Wire
programme.desc: A thin piece of wire and some cryptic numbers on a sales receipt held the key to a brutal and senseless murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Van-ished
programme.desc: A twelve-year-old girl claimed she had been abducted and sexually assaulted. She recounted what happened in such a flat, unemotional voice that police found it difficult to believe her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Ring Him Up
programme.desc: For ten years, the disappearance of a college co-ed was a mystery until new scientific testing cast a different light on a man who had been a suspect all along.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Impression
programme.desc: For sixteen years, a woman's death was considered an accident. Until someone called the authorities suggesting it was murder-- and turned up dead themselves.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Secret Solved
programme.desc: Breaking news forces Josh to race across the globe. One of the wickedly hard puzzles of The Secret, a case Josh has been chasing for years, might have been solved. He's been crisscrossing the US to track it down, but this solve is in Josh's hometown.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Unearthed
programme.desc: Episodes of the show with extra facts.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures to Africa, embedding with fierce warriors and squaring off with lions to investigate the mystery of humanity's origins. Then, Expedition X ventures into Cambodia's jungle searching for a monster that's haunted the area for centuries.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19
programme.desc: Five US Navy planes vanish without a trace in the Bermuda Triangle, fueling speculation that this strange stretch of water is cursed. Using the latest science and tech, a team of experts investigate why the planes disappeared and where they are today.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Hunting Our Ancient Ancestors
programme.desc: Josh Gates ventures to Africa, embedding with fierce warriors and squaring off with lions to investigate the mystery of humanity's origins. Then, Expedition X ventures into Cambodia's jungle searching for a monster that's haunted the area for centuries.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle: Vanishing of Flight 19

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bears of a Feather
programme.desc: When a hungry bear breaks into Noah's tent and spooks the livestock, the Browns suspect it is being attracted by the ranch's newest arrivals, three young ostriches. Later, the windmill assembly takes the siblings to dangerous new heights.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Storm's Fury
programme.desc: The first major storm of the season threatens the family's progress. With a big bush wedding coming in days, the Browns race to obtain and haul much needed water tanks before the full force of the storm hits.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: A Very Bush Wedding
programme.desc: The wolfpack prepares for their first ever wedding in the bush. But as the family prepares to welcome a new member, emotions run high and the Browns struggle to keep their most ambitious project on track.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bam Bam's Big Build and Bears
programme.desc: A hungry predator encroaches deeper onto North Star Ranch forcing Bird and Gabe to take stronger action. Bam must play nice with his siblings in an effort to finally break ground on his homestead. Gabe has an incredible surprise for the Wolf Pack.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Bear Meets Girl
programme.desc: When an ostrich lays its first egg, the Brown siblings rush to figure out how to incubate it. Bear gets a special visit from a girl on North Star Ranch as the family prepares for a surprise celebration for Billy and Ami's 40th wedding anniversary.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Noah's Animal Ark
programme.desc: The Browns flee the mountain during a dangerous lightning storm in the heat of fire season. To ensure their safety, they devise ingenious new fire safety measures, including a bush alert system and animal evacuation ark, which they put to the test.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Where There's Water There's a Way
programme.desc: As the siblings race to complete their ambitious water system, Billy gets news that shakes the Wolfpack and redirects their future. Meanwhile, Bear goes on an important hunt where he reflects on an important life decision.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Drowning
programme.desc: The Raneys must save two Hawaiian homesteaders who built their dream homestead in the path of life-threatening flash floods. As the weather closes in, the Raneys must battle to save a homestead from drowning and also win the trust of the homesteaders.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Bearanoia
programme.desc: The Raneys rush to a failing homestead in Colorado where they find husband Don makes a 40-mile mountain commute each day, leaving his wife alone, terrified to leave the house because it's surrounded by bears and mountain lions.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Wolves at the Door
programme.desc: Poisoned well water and a mystery predator plague an Arizona homestead. After the family dog is killed, the Raney's must act quick to stop the couple from becoming the next victims.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Nevada Thirst
programme.desc: In the Nevada desert, the Kondors' homestead has turned to dust. The Raneys discover rattler infested trailers, searing heat and sand storms, but when Marty finds the Kondors have no water, he gambles all to save the dying homestead.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Honey I Torched the Homestead
programme.desc: Fire is a constant threat for this Oregon homestead. Livestock should be meat, but here they are family pets. The Raneys must teach a hungry family to working together before it’s too late.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Kirsten's Story
programme.desc: Weighing over 600 pounds, Kirsten is close to losing all her mobility. While she's trying to get control of her obesity she's also in danger of losing her troubled son.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Joyce's Story
programme.desc: Joyce needs home health care 24/7 and hasn't left the house in 3 years. But getting to Dr. Now in Houston is just the first step, and when he prescribes therapy where Joyce must revisit an unhappy past with her mom, it might be more than she can handle.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Carlton and Shantel's Story
programme.desc: Shantel's brother Carlton lives downstairs but she hardly ever sees him because at 600+ lbs each, neither of them can do the stairs safely. Now to break free from codependent eating, they need Dr. Now's help to reforge their sibling relationship.

programme.title: My Feet Are Killing Me: Alligator Feet
programme.desc: Dr. Vincent faces an 8-hour surgery to repair the worst case of dancer's feet she's ever seen. A woman's club feet give Dr. Schaeffer a shocking surprise when he removes her shoes.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Losing Half Myself
programme.desc: Phyllis and Patty aren't just identical twins, they're identical twin hoarders. They've transformed every home in which they've ever lived into a complete disaster area.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Carlton and Shantel's Story
programme.desc: Shantel's brother Carlton lives downstairs but she hardly ever sees him because at 600+ lbs each, neither of them can do the stairs safely. Now to break free from codependent eating, they need Dr. Now's help to reforge their sibling relationship.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Losing Half Myself
programme.desc: Phyllis and Patty aren't just identical twins, they're identical twin hoarders. They've transformed every home in which they've ever lived into a complete disaster area.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Leaving Everything Behind
programme.desc: Mary must decide if she will rejoin the Amish church. Jeremiah and Carmela make a risky decision to save their marriage. Sabrina must prove to Jeremiah that she's changed. Shelly, Lowell, and Dawn decide to explore the English world.

programme.title: Sister Wives: An Awkward Valentine's Day
programme.desc: Kody pushes the idea of building one big house, but the Sister Wives are divided. Then it's Valentine's Day, a very awkward holiday for a polygamist. Lastly, at Kody's birthday party, Mariah and her girlfriend show up with a major announcement.

programme.title: Sister Wives: Why Not One House?
programme.desc: Janelle moves (again!) to be closer to her Sister Wives. Kody won't let go of his dream to live all under one roof but the wives can't agree to do it. Robyn wonders if they have failed as polygamists if they can't live together.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Amber and Amanda
programme.desc: Amber Flores feeds her family of six on $50 a week. Amanda tries to best her own couponing record.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Missy and Nicole
programme.desc: Missy plans to get 700 toothbrushes and other supplies to donate to a center that helps teen moms. Former marine and single mom Nicole can keep her daughter in dance lessons because of couponing.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Rebecca and Jessica
programme.desc: Rebecca will fit all of her food needs for her huge party into her $50 monthly food budget. Jessica will pull off 18 transactions to get over $600 worth of groceries.

programme.title: Extreme Couponing: Rudy and Gia
programme.desc: Couponer Rudy and her husband, Chase, are renewing their vows and Rudy wants to spend just $20 on the reception.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: Like Mother, Like Daughter
programme.desc: It is an emotional battlefield as mothers and daughters struggle to prepare for the long journey ahead that will change their lives forever.

programme.title: My Teen Is Pregnant and So Am I: For the Love of Family
programme.desc: Tensions run high at Lorna and Chae's baby shower. Kim's boyfriend violates probation. Newly single Nicole struggles. Lemhele races to the hospital to give birth.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Paralyzed by Clutter
programme.desc: Extreme hoarder Mary Thompson is in denial while Anne Thomas fears she's passing down her compulsion to son Brendan. For decades they've had trouble discarding their belongings but will they finally gain clarity and get the help they so desperately need?

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Stop Touching My Stuff!
programme.desc: For 16-year-old Haley, it takes less than a week to fill a bedroom. Her parents hope that a visit with an extreme hoarder who has lost everything will scare their daughter straight.

programme.title: My 600-lb Life: Annjeannette's Story
programme.desc: When Annjeanette was nine, a campaign was established to send her to fat camp. She hated that her weight had become a source of public shame and she has struggled to overcome her food addiction. Now, she must change her habits to save her life.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Andria and David
programme.desc: David is the only love Andria has ever known. His passionate love letters and voice messages have a way of making Andria stay. But having never met after 10 years, Andria needs to know what David is hiding that keeps him away.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Dylan and Ally
programme.desc: Dylan receives an anonymous text warning him that his online love, Ally, is not who she says she is and enlists Nev and Max to help find her. After the mystery texter is revealed, the guys uncover a huge web of deceit.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Derek and Annabelle
programme.desc: A mystery email leads Nev and Laura to help Derek track down his online love Annabelle. After digging, they uncover a sexy Snapchat scandal, betrayal, and a conclusion that hits closer to home than Derek could have ever dreamed.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show
programme.desc: Nev Schulman and Max Joseph journey cross-country to unite young couples and take their online-only romantic relationships offline to meet in person.

programme.title: Catfish: The TV Show: Danielle and BJ
programme.desc: Nev and Kamie get a letter from a woman worried that her friend Danielle is being catfished by a guy named BJ. BJ comforted Danielle when she was shot, but now she needs to know who she's really been dating for the past six years.

programme.title: True Life Crime: The $5 Million Phone Hack
programme.desc: After $5 million goes missing from dozens of unsuspecting victims, the police discover a massive case of identity theft.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling LXI
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo get pissed off at The New Guy, try and hide out with some Crappy Chameleons, and enter the terrifying world of The Dark Web.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Guy Fieri

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling VII

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kaitlyn Farrington

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Grossness

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Redfoo
programme.desc: Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob and the gang to talk about the 'legends of campfoo' going 'lights out' and learn what it means to get 'party rock'd.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XVI

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling XXI
programme.desc: Rob, Sterling and Chanel take a much needed 'Karate Break,' try to figure out what's wrong with some highly 'Defective Pets' and play a classic game of 'Heads or Tails.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Gene Dyrdek
