programme.desc: Find out if any of the Jokers are avid skiers, and how the maître d' helped when seating patrons. Also, learn why Joe had a hard time escaping the giant cake.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Tied and Feathered
programme.desc: The parts of Out of Remote Control that annoyed people more than any challenge to date. Why the crew was emotionally scarred after Debate and Switch.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Blind Justice
programme.desc: Find out why the Jokers killed the idea of Joe going shirtless in the boxing ring, and which of the Jokers loves dancing but is no good at it.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stage Fright
programme.desc: The guys serve up raw deals at a pawn shop counter and try to convince strangers to give them hugs. Plus, tonight's loser performs his life story through song.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Beware the Bucket
programme.desc: Two teams of best friends enter the Pepperdome with confidence, but Chef Willie's demonic sauces bring them down hard and early.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Adam Devine
programme.desc: John Mayer takes on the wings of death and everything on the way. Plus, the best guitar faces in history, living in Montana and more.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Quantum Mock-Anics
programme.desc: Find out which joker gets dizzy when a cab has a strong air freshener, who can speak Spanish, and which joker struggles to keep a straight face during Joe's 'expert' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Find out how many mousetraps accidentally went off during Q's turn in 'hold this please,' what made Joe and Murr join 'team skins' in Columbus park, and how Murr's tech punishment made show history.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Spider Man
programme.desc: Find out which of the jokers is the handiest, who hates the taste of beer, and how Q's love of animals beat out his arachnophobia and made for a better punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Silence of the Lame
programme.desc: Find out who keeps the tags on his jacket so he can return them, which crew member voices the 'sexy beast' commercial, and what chain restaurant the guys used during Sal's 'shush!' punishment at the mall.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Sloth Couples Therapy

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Chimp Negotiations

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Adventurous Bear Cub

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx-Sized: Courting Komodos and Cats
programme.desc: The survival of species is an essential part of the Bronx Zoo's mission. For some animals, the process of breeding can be tricky, especially when it involves a few hundred pounds of muscle, sharp teeth and bad tempers.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Sea Otter Summer Camp
programme.desc: The team is determined to have Gibson the sea otter pup discover his independence as he separates from his pal, Mara. The African penguins head off-site for spring cleaning, and Thor the moray eel proves he's the ultimate escape artist.

programme.title: The Aquarium: Penguins in Love
programme.desc: A staff member heads to the Marine Mammal Center in California to help in rehabilitation efforts of elephant seals. African penguins Charlie and Lizzie have been together for 25 years, and Charlie is having issues with his eyes. A piranha needs surgery.

programme.desc: The survival of species is an essential part of the Bronx Zoo's mission. For some animals, the process of breeding can be tricky, especially when it involves a few hundred pounds of muscle, sharp teeth and bad tempers.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Africa's Deadliest Snakes

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Good Kitty, Bad Kitty

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: Runaway Dog

programme.title: The Vet Life: Doctor Dads

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Steve's Legacy Continues
programme.desc: After months of training, Robert steps into his father's shoes to feed Graham, Australia Zoo's most notorious crocodile, solo, in front of the entire Crocoseum. Bindi witnesses one of nature's rarest events: Cedar the Koala has given birth to twins.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Snakes in a Zoo
programme.desc: Reticulated pythons, 'Jodie Foster' and Bali, are two of the most dangerous animals at the zoo. When a window is broken in their habitat, keepers have to find a way of distracting these man-eating creatures so that the repair work can be completed.

programme.title: The Zoo: Miracle Cub

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Rick's Bad Day
programme.desc: The shop has a chance to buy a playbill from the theatre from the night that Abraham Lincoln was assassinated, but first they must determine its authenticity.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pinball Wizards
programme.desc: The guys have a chance to buy a vintage pinball machine but it is in need some serious repairs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Ready, Set, Pawn
programme.desc: A seller brings in a competition dragster racecar. Rick and Corey check out a Japanese landmine training kit from World War II. A fully restored 1957 Dr. Pepper vending machine is up for grabs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Dirty Sox
programme.desc: A baseball signed by members of the infamous 1919 Chicago Black Sox has Rick and Corey seeing green. Four original paintings by Andy Warhol brush by.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Corey's Big Burn
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars prepare to play rough when an original program from the very first NFL championship rushes into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: The Pawntridge Family
programme.desc: The guys check out a first edition copy of 20,000 Leagues under the Sea.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Fiction
programme.desc: A cast jacket from 'Pulp Fiction' is brought into the shop. Then, Corey goes solo when opera gloves signed by Hollywood legend Clark Gable are brought in. Later, Rick heads to Lonnie Hammargren's home to check out his collection of unique items.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Chumdae
programme.desc: A legendary 1967 Shelby GT350 speeds into the shop. Then, Corey and Chumlee play with the idea of buying one of the first video game consoles, a Magnavox Odyssey 200. Later, Chumlee seeks the go-ahead from Rick to test out the shop's new ice cream maker.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Game Over
programme.desc: The Pawn Stars get lift off when a hovercraft makes its way to the shop. Corey checks out some 1960's Beatles bobbleheads. Then, Rick lets the guys play with a new arcade game that has come into the shop.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Trading Up
programme.desc: An original sketch from 'Rocky and Bullwinkle' is brought into the shop. Then, Rick is presented with what is believed to be a first edition of Richard Nixon's memoirs.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Live Long and Prosper
programme.desc: The shop gets its hands on an Eli Whitney Civil War revolver and a signed picture of the original Star Trek cast. Then, Chumlee decides to unfriend Corey in real life when Corey unfriends him on social media.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawn Brothers
programme.desc: 1894 S Barber Dime, a John Belushi autograph, a 1950s Jim Henson puppet pops in, and a 1965 Schwinn bicycle.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Four Score and Seven Pawns
programme.desc: An 1800s Colt revolver barrels into the shop, and an antique Chinese fingernail guard scratches in. Later, a screen-used Playboy magazine from 'Forrest Gump' reveals itself.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Pawned at the Stake
programme.desc: Something wicked to the shop comes when an 18th century 'Tryal of Witches' book finds its way there. Rick checks out a 20th century airplane control yoke and a gold-plated banjo. The guys evaluate a restored car from the film 'Wanye's World.'

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Going, Going Pawn!
programme.desc: The Pawns Stars are knocked out of the park when a drive to L. A. promises Rick a peek at Babe Ruth's "called shot" bat.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Here's Looking At You, Pawn!
programme.desc: A first edition of the 1911 novel 'Peter Pan' finds Rick, but he’s also swept up by a piece of scrap metal from a fallen airship. A seller hopes to wow Rick with a kneeling Thepanom statue. Corey decides if a 'Casablanca' poster is worth its high price.

programme.title: Pawn Stars: Happy Meal, Happy Day
programme.desc: Excerpts from the first Continental Congress make their way into the shop. Then, Rick relives one of history's worst disasters when he checks out actual wreckage from the Hindenburg. Later, Chumlee scores a deal on the ultimate Happy Meal.

programme.title: Movie: Gunga Din
programme.desc: Based loosely on the poem by Rudyard Kipling, this takes place in British India during the Thuggee uprising.

programme.title: Movie: The Pink Panther

programme.title: Movie: Around the World in 80 Days
programme.desc: An English gentleman makes a wager that he can travel around the world in eighty days.

programme.title: Movie: Pepe

programme.title: Movie: The Music Man

programme.desc: A fast-rising nightclub singer, interrupts her career to marry a struggling songwriter.

programme.title: Movie: Experiment Perilous

programme.title: Movie: Algiers
programme.desc: A Parisian tourist and a thief fall in love, but their relationship ends in betrayal.

programme.title: Movie: After the Thin Man

programme.desc: Cricket Green and his family move from the country to Big City to live with Gramma. Cricket and Bill accidentally disturb some raccoons in the garage, and they invade the house!

programme.desc: Jessie, Bertram and the kids head to Bali for a family vacation, but when their private jet starts to fail, Jessie takes control of the cockpit and makes an emergency landing on a tropical island.

programme.desc: Nia wants to use her money to buy an expensive jacket.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Oh Father, Where Art Thou?
programme.desc: Nia is excited Devon is going to fly in for her school's daddy/ daughter dance.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Reversal of Fortune
programme.desc: The counselors clean out the storage and find a fortune teller machine. They pull it out and it reads something important will go missing and a sister will betray another sister.

programme.title: Movie: Zombies 2
programme.desc: A cheerleader and a football players are preparing to go off to their prom. They don't realize that they are facing danger, in the form of teenage werewolves that threaten to derail their plans for the perfect night.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Crushin' It
programme.desc: When Gabby develops a crush on a boy from her school, her attempts to fight her own feelings inadvertently throws the boy's life into chaos!

programme.title: Raven's Home: Smoky Flow
programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: As Bad As She Gets
programme.desc: Sydney surprises her dad Max for his birthday by inviting his childhood best friend Leo and his son to visit from San Francisco.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Gruel and Unusual Punishment
programme.desc: The kids explore the booths at Camp Kikiwaka’s Olde Moose Rump Days. They find an old wooden box from Zuri’s booth and suddenly find themselves in the 1600s.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: Wesley and the Fischman
programme.desc: Gabby has to choose between keeping her new alien-babysitting gig a secret and risking it all by confiding in her extraterrestrial-obsessed best friend, Wesley.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Bringing Up Toilet

programme.title: Jessie: But Africa Is So ... Fari

programme.title: Black-ish: Road to a Championship

programme.title: Black-ish: Plus Two Isn't a Thing

programme.desc: Dr. Pol juggles cases that send him out to help a horse combating colic, a rabbit that can’t hop and a working dog named Stitches, with possible head trauma.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Deepwater Disaster

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Nightmare in Florida
programme.desc: When a brand-new bridge suddenly collapses in Miami, several die in a horrifying calamity. Experts use the latest science to investigate what went wrong and how an innovative bridge-building technique could be to blame.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes: Apollo 13: The Secret Evidence
programme.desc: New science reveals the inside story of the Apollo 13 disaster, and using the latest evidence, experts reveal what really went wrong and how NASA saved the lives of the three astronauts stranded in space in a life-or-death race against the clock.

programme.title: Impossible Engineering: Conquering Avalanche Country
programme.desc: Deadly avalanches and catastrophic flooding are ever-present threats at one of the world's busiest ski resorts, but new technology and cutting-edge construction methods help engineers conquer the elements to keep this mountain-top getaway safe.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: US Air Force Super Plane
programme.desc: Richard Hammond climbs aboard the US Air Force's biggest cargo plane, an airborne behemoth that uses cutting-edge engineering and the latest technology to fly vital equipment and heavy-duty military vehicles across the planet.

programme.title: Richard Hammond's Big: Volkswagen Mega Factory
programme.desc: Richard visits the biggest car factory in the globe, located in Wolfsburg Germany. A space with the kind of technology and pace that allows for the churning out of one new car every 16 seconds.

programme.desc: Two men who live next to each other in a housing project get into a deadly argument. Crewell and Williams take two men's girlfriends back to headquarters to find out what happened.

programme.desc: Maribel Ramos is a US army veteran with a complicated love life. When she arranges to meet an online date, she disappears, leaving family and friends desperate for news. Detectives are left to uncover a twisted tale of jealousy and rage.

programme.desc: When Brad McGarry is discovered murdered in his Ohio basement, residents in this sleepy coalmining town are left in shock. Detectives suspect robbery but then a friend comes forward and points them in the direction of someone whom they least expected.

programme.title: Murder Calls: No Good Deed Goes Unpunished

programme.desc: A terrified neighbour calls 911 when she witnesses a young mother gunned down in her driveway. Police work to uncover a complex conspiracy that ripped the loving mother from her three children, just to keep dark secrets hidden.

programme.desc: A mother of three goes missing. Her car is found in flames but she is nowhere in sight. As police begin to investigate, they find she had been keeping a secret from her family-one that would point the case in an entirely new direction.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: The War Next Door
programme.desc: Thirty-one gunshots fired, two men dead and another badly wounded. But the alleged shooter Billy Woodward claimed he did nothing wrong he was just defending his family from his neighbours' alleged months-long harassment.

programme.title: See No Evil: Last Look of Summer
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill, detectives race to discover the killer behind the brutal crime. With no leads, police turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's chilling attempt to cover his tracks.

programme.title: See No Evil: Someone to Watch Over Her
programme.desc: On a freezing winter night, a hardworking mother doesn't make it home from work. As dawn breaks, her body is found in a churchyard. With the city in panic, Police turn to the city's surveillance cameras... hoping they can help catch a brutal murderer.

programme.title: See No Evil: Dead Man Walking
programme.desc: In September 2015, Edward Lowry is found savagely beaten and stabbed to death in a parking lot in South Dakota. With little evidence left behind at the scene, can police painstakingly piece together Ed's last moments from CCTV to find his killer?

programme.title: See No Evil: Seeking Out Maple
programme.desc: In the early hours of September 28th, 2011, student Maple Batalia is found shot dead in the parking lot of Simon Fraser University.

programme.title: America's Code Breakers
programme.desc: American code breakers have given the United States an edge in every conflict in American history. But with uncrackable encryption available for your cell phone and computer, have U.S. code warriors finally met their match?

programme.title: Civil War Conspiracies
programme.desc: From a secret society that gathers in the dead of night and plots the assassination of Abraham Lincoln, to U.S. spymaster Alan Pinkerton who stops Confederate agents, the outcome of the Civil War is often decided by spies.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror
programme.desc: Unabomber Ted Kaczynski terrorized the country with mail bombs but when his brother David realized who was the Unabomber, he made a hard decision to turn Ted over to authorities. David shares his dramatic story with us and retraces the Unabomber's steps.

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Deadly Cults
programme.desc: Discover some of America's most infamous cults. Whether its religious fire-and -brimstone, Armageddon, or visitors from outer space, the US has no shortage of like-minded people coming together to get swept up in the fervour.

programme.title: Unabomber: 20 Years of Terror

programme.title: Waco Standoff: As We Watched
programme.desc: On April 19, 1993, FBI agents attacked a religious compound in Waco, Texas, occupied by a small obscure religious cult. 76 people, including 26 children, died. The repercussions of Waco are still being felt.

programme.title: Manson: The Prison Tapes
programme.desc: Relive the horrific Tate and LaBianca murders, and the media circus surrounding the trials of cult leader Charles Manson and his 'family' of misfit killers.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Priory of Sion
programme.desc: Inside Secret Societies investigates the mysterious secret society known as 'The Priory of Sion' that traces its roots back to the 12th Century and is believed to protect incontrovertible, if heretical, information about the marriage of Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Inside Secret Societies: The Order of Assassins
programme.desc: The Assassins were one of the mostly deadly, notorious and secretive groups in the medieval world. Find out if the romance behind these brutally efficient killers is true and if their skills and tactics have been copied by today's Islamic terrorists.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: A Culture of Control
programme.desc: Hitler is determined to change the way German people think and feel by creating a new, Nazi form of art and culture. He takes over the film industry and radio stations, giving the Nazis complete control over every image and message his people receive.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Himmler's Empire of Terror
programme.desc: Hitler's bid for power depends on his most loyal, and violent supporters: the SS. Using surveillance, detention, and even murder, they defeat political enemies and are most responsible for putting Hitler's deadly policy of racial purity into practice.

programme.title: Project Nazi: The Blueprints of Evil: Retreat from Reality
programme.desc: Adolf Hitler is determined to fight to the very end, even if it costs millions of Germans their lives. He puts his faith in his the 'Wunderwaffe' and the 'wonder weapons,' including the first ever ballistic missile, the V2.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Guns
programme.desc: A rapid-fire cannon that's becoming a hit with the US military; the personal defence weapon that has the same knockdown as bigger guns, the Gatling gun that rains fire on target and the new multi-calibre assault weapon.

programme.title: FutureWeapons: Future Warrior
programme.desc: An assault riffle that can be converted into a sniper riffle is examined.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Gatling and the A-10
programme.desc: The aerial Gatling gun has the highest rate of fire of any military machine gun in the world. Host Wil Willis flies in an F16 to see the six thousand round a minute Vulcan rip apart targets and fires the minigun from a helicopter at exploding cars.

programme.title: Triggers: Weapons That Changed the World: Spec Ops Pistols
programme.desc: For today's elite warriors, their last line of defence is the spec ops pistols. Wil tests the Navy Seal Sig Sauer P226, then fires the greatest forerunners like James Bond's Walther PPK, the Soviet Tokarev and the massive Desert Eagle.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Blacksburg Barn
programme.desc: The dawgs head to Blacksburg, Virginia, to salvage an 1800s barn with an internal log structure. It should be an easy job, but a hurricane on the horizon means a tighter deadline to make it out before the storm arrives.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Twin Capes Ferry
programme.desc: The crew heads to Norfolk, VA, to test their sea legs and salvage an obsolete ferry including lights, skylights and a mural. Back at the shop, Grayson helps Mike and Tay with a commissioned build for a fellow maker.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Country Store and Gas Station
programme.desc: The crew heads to Grottoes, Virginia, to salvage and demolish an old country store. Using materials from the project, Mike and Robert create a tribute bench for a veterans' retreat.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Return to Delaware
programme.desc: The team faces cold winter weather as they attempt to quickly salvage as much as possible from an old church in Laurel, DE. They remove large stained glass, ceiling tiles, and doors. Later, a build shapes up to look like an outhouse.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Burnout House
programme.desc: The team goes to Lexington, VA, to see what they can save from a fire-damaged house that had recently been converted to apartments.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Lexington Storefront
programme.desc: The crew take a stab at a refurbished storefront in historic downtown Lexington, Virginia. This second-generation salvage requires a lot of finesse, as the building is being renovated rather than destroyed. Windowpanes become a room divider.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Taylor Family Farm
programme.desc: Picking through old farm land and former Native American settlement, the crew find several treasures to load up and take back to Roanoke. Mike and Tay build a freight cart couch in the shop and Robert gets excited about a corn sheller.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: American Viscose Plant
programme.desc: The Dawgs save a kiln from the American Viscose Plant in Roanoke, VA. Mike and Tay work together to build custom tables for a local optometrist office. Will Farmer also returns to appraise a map from 1853.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The River House: Part 2
programme.desc: Mike throws Michael a curveball that has major consequences for their business partnership. The rebuild of the River House continues as they battle muck, rain and snow, and after many stressful months, the property is ready to be revealed.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: The Country House: Part 1
programme.desc: Mike and Michael buy a bungalow in the country that sits on five acres with a barn and two-car garage. It also has major water issues, leeching bed woes and a flooring battle that won't be swept under the rug.

programme.desc: Nathan and Jenny work with a couple who want a 30-foot yurt with a loft, a gazebo and a smaller yurt bathroom. The huge project is on a tight, one-week deadline and an even tighter $60,000 budget.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Barn Hunters: Butter Creek Bank Barn Gut Renovation
programme.desc: Sean and the boys at Bucks County Timbercraft take on the gut renovation of an 1841 Pennsylvania Bank Barn.

programme.title: Barn Hunters: 17th Century Charm Transforms to Modern Luxury Wine Cellar and Cigar Lounge
programme.desc: Sean Tracy meets with new clients about transforming their 200 year old field stone bank barn into a modern guesthouse. Sean returns to former clients' barn home to build a custom wine cellar and cigar lounge.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Calamity
programme.desc: Nicole is hired by one of her clients to rehab his cluttered, compact kitchen into a useable, restored space for his family.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Bathroom Beautification
programme.desc: Nicole takes on another design project while waiting for the Minnehaha house to sell. This time it's her client's colourful sea themed bathroom that needs fixing.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Kitchen Overhaul
programme.desc: Nicole teams with basketball superstar LeBron James to renovate a special family's house in his hometown of Akron, Ohio. They gut the dingy, dilapidated kitchen and create an outdoor patio and new driveway for playing basketball.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Hardwood Floors to the Rescue
programme.desc: LeBron James and Nicole renovate the home of a family in need. They transform two bedrooms into three, to give each child their own room.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Bathroom Fit for King James
programme.desc: Downstairs is done at the Akron, Ohio house Nicole is rehabbing with LeBron and his foundation and now attention turns to the bathroom.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Looks Are Everything
programme.desc: The interior is coming along beautifully and now it's time to give the exterior of the family house in Akron a facelift. LeBron and his kids spar off with Nicole in a duel of diggers to tear out the front steps and regrade the yard.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: A Room of Their Own
programme.desc: Nicole, LeBron and the LeBron James Family Foundation continue with their project to renovate a needy family's home into a renovated beauty.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Mom's Oasis
programme.desc: Hard working mom, Nicole Curtis is on a mission to create a master bedroom for mom Melanie in the final episode of the LeBron James Family Foundation house.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Garage Door Greatness
programme.desc: With the Minnehaha house still sitting on the market, Nicole decides to put her own house up for sale in hopes that it will sell faster. But before she can do this she gives her garage a much-needed makeover and removes asbestos from her basement.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Unfinished-Finished Basement
programme.desc: Preparing to put her house up for sale, Nicole turns her attention to the cluttered basement and devises a plan to update the space while also keeping the unfinished, industrial feel it would have had when the house was built.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Roof Renovation Donation
programme.desc: Nicole is back on Campbell Street helping her 85-year-old veteran neighbour, Art, repair his home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Returning to Campbell
programme.desc: Nicole returns to her first big Detroit flip, the Campbell house, where a pipe burst and ruined the upstairs and downstairs kitchens. She decides to restore both spaces a second time using any pieces she can salvage.

programme.title: Building Alaska: A New World of Challenges
programme.desc: Three news teams begin their projects and rookie builders Matt and Amy Hill quickly realize building in snow is more complicated than they planned. Mike and Dan Owens mill their own lumber while Jackie hires professionals to dig her foundation.

programme.title: Building Alaska: This Is the Sketchy Part
programme.desc: The Hills work on their first floor framing, but work slows to a stop when their tools begin to freeze. The Owens work on installing the second story gables, while Jackie and her team work to finish the cabin's roof structure.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Eggstraordinary
programme.desc: Gail Simmons, Alton Brown, Robert Irvine and others are EGGcited to talk about in this EGGceptional episode.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Finger Food
programme.desc: Alton Brown, Gail Simmons, Alex Guarnaschelli, and others are throwin' down the cutlery and reaching for their best ever finger foods.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Road Trip
programme.desc: Hears some of the best food stops around America from Food Network celebrities.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: All American
programme.desc: Some of the best know Food Network stars talk about their favourite American dishes.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Deep-Fried Comfort Creations
programme.desc: Michael digs into an incredible one-of-a-kind creation: a deep-fried burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Ooey, Gooey and Cheesy
programme.desc: Michael Symon gets messy in New Orleans with a bacon-onion jam, brie and brioche burger.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Smoked, Stuffed and Smothered
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon devours a delicious dumpling-inspired pork and shrimp burger and an elevated pub food classic. In Shreveport, La., a wood-fired pizza is topped with spicy roast chicken and sweet corn.

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Scary Good Smoked Meat
programme.desc: In San Diego, Michael Symon chows down on fish tacos with housemade blue corn tortillas and a meaty Mexican pizza. In Denver, a local Colorado lamb patty is a remake of a traditional Hawaiian hangover cure, the Loco Moco.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Smoking and Spit-Roasting in Texas
programme.desc: Roger Mooking finds two chefs in Texas who are pushing the boundaries of whole hog barbecue, where pigs are roasted low and slow over coals before the meat is chopped or pulled and seasoned with sauce.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Get Your Grill On
programme.desc: Roger Mooking is in Lockhart, Texas, to meet the team responsible for designing and crafting a monster rig that offers seven different cooking contraptions.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: BBQ and Boils in the Bayou
programme.desc: Roger Mooking visits the Louisiana bayou for barbecue, brunch and a crawfish boil. In Prairieville, L.A., he helps a husband-and-wife team of caterers prepare baby back ribs, brisket and 200 pounds of live crawfish.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Fiery Couples
programme.desc: From live-fire cooking to low-and-slow barbecue, Roger Mooking meets up with two couples making fiery feasts and creating sparks in California.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: London: A Second Bite
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the iconic British dishes and ethnically diverse foods that have put London on the culinary map, from humble shepherd's pie and posh beef Wellington to sizzling seekh kebabs and smoky Jamaican jerk chicken.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jersey Shore
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the boardwalk indulgences of the Jersey Shore. From sticky-sweet saltwater taffy, to slices of tomato pie and Italian subs, the Jersey Shore's culinary scene is a carnival for the taste buds.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Quito
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the diverse culinary classics of Ecuador's capital city, Quito. The urban cuisine satisfies stomachs with fried pork and potato cakes, fresh ceviche, sugar-coated roasted peanuts, fish soup and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Carnivore's Cookout in California
programme.desc: Roger is in central California for two meat-filled cookouts. This region is home to many vineyards, but Paso de Record Vineyard is what catches Roger's interest.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: West Coast Roasts
programme.desc: Visiting the Passmore Ranch in Sloughhouse, Roger must try to catch a fish by hand. Also, at the Santa Maria Elks Lodge, he will assist in building a fire pit for cooking up some beef.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Wilderness Cooking

programme.desc: When Buddy the Bunny goes missing on the Muppet Babies Express, Summer Penguin sets out to find him. Mr. Manny steps in for Miss Nanny when she runs an errand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop Lazlo!/ The Hot Diggity Dog Show
programme.desc: When Commander Heist tries to steal Von Drake's Smarty Hat, Heist's cat gets in the way. The Happy Helpers get called to be pet groomers for The Hot Doggity Dog Show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Monstrous Truck/ Minnie's Vacation Home!
programme.desc: Mickey accidentally turns his roadster into a monster truck! Daisy and Cuckoo Loca worry that Minnie is moving out!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Stripe Out/ A Splashy Delivery
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy try to find out what mysterious striped animal they are delivering. While delivering a baby octopus, Pip and Freddy accidentally unplug the crate.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob and Ana's Bubble Bummer/ Seen Any Seashells?
programme.desc: The Playcare float breaks down before the People and Pets Parade! The Pugs and Keia head out on an ocean-bound mission to find the perfect seashell for Ana!

programme.title: Vampirina: Acrobat Boris/ The Lemonade Stand
programme.desc: Boris gets an invitation to reunite with an acorbatic flying troupe. Vee and Poppy run a lemonade stand.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Caution: Kids at Work! / The Snoozy Doozy Pet and Breakfast!
programme.desc: Buddy is Mickey's number one fan, and he can't wait to get to work for Mini=Mechanics day. Then, The Happy Helpers need to transform the Snoozy-Doozy into a pet hotel when they get so many pet-sitting requests.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: How ARF Got His Bark Back / Sir Bob
programme.desc: When Bob can't fix ARF's voice box, Bingo and Rolly race to find an inventor. Bob's favorite knight goes missing at a jousting event, plunging the Pugs on a mission to find him!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The French Toast Connection/ Take Me Out to the Pug Game
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly travel to France to get Bob some French toast. Then, the pugs chase Bob's prized baseball across the city.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Operation: Dinner/ The Case of the Missing Caterpillar
programme.desc: When Bob stays late at work to do a presentation and forgets his dinner, the pugs decide to bring it to him. Keia's new caterpillar friend goes missing.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moon Prix/ Pirates Ahoy!
programme.desc: Catboy is tempted to cheat when he must race to win back his stolen Catcar. When Gekko and Owlette's overconfidence plays right into Ninja's plan, they must learn to work together.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Meet An Yu
programme.desc: Night Ninja heads to Mystery Mountain to unleash the mountain's magic. The PJ Masks team up with Dragon Girl to stop him.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Upside-Down Day / Tooth and Consequences
programme.desc: When Summer has a case of bad-day-itis, Gonzo's cure is turning the whole playroom upside down. Later, Animal loses a tooth but the Tooth Fairy didn't leave him anything.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Grandpa Camp / A Backyard Divided
programme.desc: It's grandparent's day and since Fozzie has never met his grandparents, Kermit finds two people to fill in for him, Statler and Waldorf. Later, when Gonzo and Piggy can't seem to get along, they divide the backyard into two separate kingdoms.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Speedy as a Cheetah / The Soup Search
programme.desc: When Bob wishes he could run fast, the pugs find cheetahs to learn the secret of their speed. The pugs go on a journey to find the perfect bowl of soup to help Bob feel better.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bingo and Rolly's Playcare Picnic Party/ Judge Rolly
programme.desc: The Pugs throw Keia a picnic when she can't attend the Playcare's picnic in the park! Rolly gets carried away when he designates himself as judge to keep the peace at Playcare!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy's Great Gig/ Owlette's New Move
programme.desc: When the school instruments go missing, Owlette and Gekko are hot on the trail. Catboy and Gekko dream up an exciting new superhero move, but Owlette can’t get it right.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Romeo's Melody/PJ Robot Takes Control
programme.desc: The PJ Masks must wear ear-protecting helmets when Romeo writes a song that turns listeners into his servant. PJ Robot tries to turn Romeo's Flying Factory into a Flying Party!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hissy's Big Day/ Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to cheer Hissy up by taking her to their favourite places. Later, A.R.F. is reprogrammed to take the pugs where they want, but not being them back.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Hawaii Pug-Oh/ A.R.F.
programme.desc: When Bob says he'd love to feel the sand on his toes, pug puppy brothers Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to Hawaii. Then, Bob introduces the pups to A.R.F., a robotic dog he created that is programmed to clean up their messes.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto's Best

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Silly Problem

programme.desc: Daisy-Bo-Peep loses her 10 sheep and enlists Mickey and the gang to help find them.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Dance
programme.desc: Daisy wants to enter the talent show but suddenly comes down with a bad case of stage fright. Enlisting help from the viewer, Mickey and his pals help Daisy rehearse and build her confidence in time to wow the crowd.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Brand New Clubhouse
programme.desc: When Donald complains everyone is in his way, Mickey and pals help him build his own clubhouse.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Babysitter
programme.desc: When Professor Von Drake's Tick Tock Time Machine accidentally turns Mickey, Minnie, Donald, Daisy and Pluto into toddlers, Goofy steps in to babysit and gets a little help from Mother Goose Clarabelle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Rainbow
programme.desc: Everyone sets out to find the End of the Rainbow.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Smarty Goof/ Adventures in Buddysitting!
programme.desc: Mickey and Goofy join the Hot Dog Hills' Invention Competition. Later, when the Hot Tog Hills play center closes, the Happy Helpers become babysitters for the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Stop That Heist/ Lights! Camera! Help!
programme.desc: Billy Beagle's famous Golden Rumble Seat Roadster becomes the target of an infamous international thief. The Happy Helpers become personal assistants to a movie star!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy's Drive-In / The Iron Mouse
programme.desc: Everyone works together to save Goofy's favourite drive-in theater.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puzzling Pugs/ Rhapsody in Pug
programme.desc: When Bob can't finish his jigsaw puzzle without a picture of a leopard, Bingo and Rolly go searching for one. The pugs unintentionally create chaos when they go to the symphony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: The Island/ Don't Cave In
programme.desc: Timid Bill and brave Rocky end up stranded on an island, however Rocky suddenly becomes the scared one! Trey warns the little dinos about a cave monster named “Shriekasaurus”.

programme.title: Gigantosaurus: Saving Ayati/ The Crevice
programme.desc: When Ayati loses her balance and falls over, Mazu must come up with a big idea to help! A large crevice rips through the ground and traps the four little dinos in Giganto’s path!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daisy's Photo Finish! / Super-Charged: Daisy's Grande Goal
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy travel to Brazil's Amazon rainforest to help Daisy's cousin get a picture of a rare bird. During a Roadster Soccer match, Daisy's competitiveness gets out of hand.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goofy Gas/ Little Big Ape
programme.desc: When Goofy invents a new fuel to make the roadsters go faster, they wind up with unexpected results. The Happy Helpers try to capture a gorilla that is loose in Clarabelle's house.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: PJ Masks: PJ Dylan/ Armadylan'd and Dangerous

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Methane Meltdown

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Troubled Water
programme.desc: The Raneys help an Oregon couple with a toxic salt water well, who are desperate for a viable water source. Marty needs clay to build a massive catchment pond and Matt must build a large scale solar still to de-contaminate the water.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Quake on the Forty
programme.desc: The Raneys return to Alaska to discover their own homestead in utter disrepair. Beetle kill has destroyed their only access, so they race to build a steel tram before the deep freeze sets in.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Surviving the Wild: Treehouse of Terror
programme.desc: With extra facts and bonus scenes: The Raneys take on a treehouse cabin on the verge of collapse. Marty overhauls the base of the cabin, and Misty builds a greenhouse out of scavenged windows. Matt adds pm a workshop for making leather goods.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Fire and Gold
programme.desc: In order to rescue a homestead at risk of igniting the next big wildfire, the Raneys must overhaul Kevin Tubbs' faulty electrical system and build the first hydro-electric wheel on the Little Susitna River to make the homestead safe for his children.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge
programme.desc: An adventurous couple builds a home with self-sustaining features near the Ozark National Forest. While they both have renovation experience, building on the dangerous mountainside terrain in a location plagued by flash foods will be a challenge.

programme.title: Reclaimed: Where There's a Mill There's a Way
programme.desc: Mine owners in Arizona have been sitting on their $100k investment for a year because they need a better milling system. Alex and Kevin must quickly decide if their can-do attitude will make this a profitable venture.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Homestead of Horrors
programme.desc: A nightmare in North Carolina. A couple that is terrified to hunt and a ramshackle home with exposed wires in the shower and chickens in the living room. The Raneys have never seen a homestead like this.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Ozark Mountain Lodge

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Idaho Death Trap
programme.desc: The Jackson family in Idaho suffers from a cabin on the verge of collapse and a predator threat for 100 chickens. The Raneys use all new ingenuity to make the cabin livable, protect the flock and create a valuable income source.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Global Game Show: Fun & Games
programme.desc: John challenges contestants, at the Highland Games in Scotland, to test their knowledge and then competes with them in physical skills game.

programme.title: Expedition X: Mothman Phenomenon
programme.desc: Jessica Chobot and Phil Torres dive into the legend of Mothman by searching for clues in a long-sealed bunker and a top-secret Air Force base.

programme.title: Expedition X: Cambodia's Jungle Monster
programme.desc: The surge of human activity surrounding the discovery of an ancient city sends Phil Torres and Jessica Chobot deep in the Cambodian jungle to search for a monster that has been terrifying locals for centuries.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Legendary Turtle of Texas
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to the swamplands of Texas in search of a giant alligator snapping turtle known as Raphael. Coyote is determined to prove that this turtle is the largest living creature of his kind.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Realm of the Caiman
programme.desc: Coyote Peterson heads to Brazil to encounter the Yacare Caiman. As he swims alongside them in piranha-infested waterways, he studies their perfect-predator personality as jaguars and capybara lurk from the shoreline.

programme.title: Coyote Peterson: Brave the Wild: Shadow of the Jaguar
programme.desc: Coyote demonstrates how capturing elusive big cats on film is a near-impossible task, but with technological advancements such as trail cameras, nature enthusiasts can see predators like jaguars up close in their natural habitat.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: D-Day Uncovered
programme.desc: In a season premiere event, Josh Gates touches down in Normandy to investigate battles on land, air and sea. The expedition reveals a Nazi threat greater than ever imagined, unearthing a massive German bunker complex buried for 75 years.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Searching For America's Lost Flight
programme.desc: Josh Gates investigates why Northwest Flight 2501 vanished, taking the lives of all 58 people on board.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Dozer Dave Returns
programme.desc: Dave Turin, a former 'Gold Rush' miner, sets out on his own prospecting for an abandoned gold mine to reopen. When an investor backs out, Dave has to decide if he's willing to risk his family's life savings on his ability to bring home the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Rookie Mistakes
programme.desc: Dozer Dave bets his life savings that he can unearth piles of gold from an abandoned mine using salvaged equipment and a team of amateur miners.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Paydirt Mystery
programme.desc: Dave faces a nightmare scenario when the ground he's mining goes cold and no one knows why. With his season hanging in the balance, the pressure mounts for Dave to get them back on the gold.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Dave Turin's Lost Mine: Last Chance Cut
programme.desc: Dave's entire season comes down to the final 24 hours and a bold risk that threatens to shut down his operation and force him out of the gold game for good.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: The Stench Is Amazing

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: Leading a Double Life
programme.desc: A family suffers the effects of mould, mice and flea infestations because their upstairs neighbor and landlord has acquired one of the show's most massive hoards to date.

programme.desc: TJ has a hard, curious lump protruding from his side. Josh has a large knot on his head. Luis has a bump on his shoulder. Brittney is covered in mysterious bumps.

programme.desc: Dr. Schaeffer has to straighten a woman's serpentine foot to reset her life, as Dr. Vincent gets a drummer's foot back on the beat.

programme.title: Return to Amish: Sabrina's Surprise

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Melody/ Marlin
programme.desc: Melody manages to only spend $1,000 a month for her family of four by sharing her extreme ways. They all sleep in one bed and share bath water. Also, Marlin will face his biggest cost-saving challenge as he organizes his daughter's sweet sixteen.

programme.title: Extreme Cheapskates: Roy and Ben
programme.desc: Ben and Roy show off their frugal lifestyles. Ben throws a party on a four dollar budget and Roy shows how he freezes his assets.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Dr. Lee Nose Best!
programme.desc: Tony has large growths on his nose that impair his breathing. Kevin has a bump in his jawline that is a 'lady deterrent.' Marie has an unsightly lump on her forehead that makes her a hermit. Tommy's leg bump makes it difficult for him to work.

programme.title: Hoarding: Buried Alive: They're Crawling!

programme.title: Floribama Shore: Bad Day at the Beach

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CXLVI

programme.title: Yukon Men: Roughing It: Banding Together

programme.desc: A devastating winter rolls in, threatening several homesteaders and their food supply. The influx of hunters coming off the main road also threatens provisions and the old way of life.

programme.title: The Crocodile Hunter: Crocodiles of the Revolution

programme.title: Too Cute!: Little Lion Pups
programme.desc: A bullmastiff puppy sticks to his aunt's side as he tries to follow in her footsteps and become a guard dog. A pair of lowchen pups seek out additional family members. An old English sheepdog finds himself being herded by his tiny sister.

programme.title: My Cat From Hell: Cats in Isolation
programme.desc: Jackson deals with four cats that are constantly at each other's throats; the Cat Daddy visits the Living Free Animal Sanctuary's cattery where territorial issues have forced two cats to live in isolation for years.

programme.title: Dr. Jeff: Rocky Mountain Vet: A Tiger's Tale
programme.desc: Dr. Jeff gives hope to a concerned owner when their dog is diagnosed with cancer. The team cares for a litter of abandoned kittens. Dr. Amy solves the mystery of a beloved cat's painful injury. And Dr. Jeff and Hector help a rescued tiger find love.

programme.title: The Vet Life: Dr. Blue Gets Tanked
programme.desc: Dr. Blue's love of fish has him wanting a home aquarium. Dr. Ross attempts to diagnose Layla, a Lab with bizarre test results, while Dr. Lavigne performs knee surgery on a bulldog. A lamb, headed to the county fair, suddenly has breathing problems.

programme.title: Crikey! It's the Irwins: Tiger Eyes
programme.desc: It's a big day for Hunter the Sumatran Tiger. He is blind and must be sedated for his annual eye check, allowing Terri to get closer than usual. The keepers prepare the young giraffe Scarlett for a road trip to South Australia, reuniting her with family.

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo: Otterly Love
programme.desc: Otter couple Diego and Icana are best friends but have never mated, so keepers decide to replace Diego with a new male Tarubu. They hope that young Tarubu will relight Icana's fire and that they will provide Chester with long awaited otter pups.

programme.title: The Zoo: A Polar Bear in the City
programme.desc: The last polar bear in NYC is showing his age, so staff make sure he gets all the attention he needs. Also, a trio of red ruffed lemurs prepare for their debut and a new exhibit is constructed for the hellbender, a giant amphibian with a bad reputation.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: A Different Mission
programme.desc: Earl takes the lead in restoring an abandoned Rottweiler to health. A service dog organization from North Carolina reaches out to Villalobos searching for a new dog for their program. M2 goes on her second rescue, taking in an owner surrender.

programme.title: Pit Bulls & Parolees: Tip of the Iceberg
programme.desc: After Tia and Sugar rescue a stray, they are shocked by what they find and race him to the vet. New worker Darius pursues his dream of working in the veterinary field. And an empty nester heads to Villalobos looking for a new companion.

programme.desc: Dre and Bow's morning routine with the kids is changing now that Bow is taking some time off work. Meanwhile, Junior bonds with Diane now that he is in charge of driving his siblings to school.

programme.desc: Dre and Bow confront gender biases of their own after finding out that both Junior and Zoey have become sexually active. Meanwhile, Ruby is hurt when she finds out that Jack and Diane have been hanging out with a friend's grandmother after school.

programme.title: Black-ish: White Breakfast
programme.desc: When Jack and Diane get in trouble at school, Dre and Bow have to figure out the right balance of discipline and support so that their kids aren't too afraid of authority nor feel entitled.

programme.title: Black-ish: Things Were Different Then
programme.desc: Dre reluctantly helps Junior plan Pops' 65th birthday party and starts to see his dad's past in a new light. Meanwhile, Bow decides to say "yes" to everything for a whole year and Jack and Diane take advantage of her.

programme.title: Black-ish: Black Math
programme.desc: When Junior is accepted to Howard and Stanford, Dre tries to convince him to attend his alma mater. Meanwhile, Jack develops a comedy style and Ruby decides she's going to manage his career, forcing Diane to compete for her attention.

programme.title: Black-ish: Dog Eat Dog World
programme.desc: The family is divided over the idea of getting a dog after Dre and Bow promise Jack they can get one after he gets Straight A's and he does. Meanwhile, Bow's brother Johan is in town and he doesn't get the warm welcome he expects from Ruby.

programme.title: Black-ish: Fifty-Three Percent
programme.desc: Dre and Bow have been fighting more than usual and they decide to go back to their therapist who suggests they make time for a date night. Meanwhile, Jack and Diane take advantage of Devante's bouncy house in different kinds of ways.

programme.title: Movie: Skyfall
programme.desc: The charming James Bond faces another challenging situation as M deals with her power being threatened. Past events are revealed, as James Bond is possibly the only agent able to help M through this troubling time as action-packed attacks wage on.

programme.title: Movie: The Hitman's Bodyguard
programme.desc: A notorious hitman who is set to testify against a ruthless dictator becomes targeted by his goons and assassins. In order to stay alive and make it to The Hague he has to team up with the government aged who's been a thorn in his side for years.

programme.title: Movie: The Transporter

programme.title: Beachfront Bargain Hunt: A Hilton Head Hideaway

programme.desc: Young parents want more space to grow their family in Atlanta. She wants to hang on to their youth as long as possible by living in the city, while he wants to relive his childhood with a big house in the suburbs.

programme.title: Don't Be Tardy for the Wedding: Maid of Dishonour

programme.desc: It was just before Halloween. Joel Lovelien and his fiancé headed to a local bar packed with people in costume. Then, Joel stepped outside and walked into a troubling mystery. Police rounded up potential suspects, but could they unmask a killer?

programme.title: The Witnesses: The Watchtower
programme.desc: After receiving leaked documents reporter Trey Bundy sets out to expose a cover up of child sexual abuse among the Jehovah's Witnesses. When he meets abuse survivors and an attorney fighting for justice he learns the conspiracy goes much deeper.

programme.title: The Witnesses: A Window for Justice
programme.desc: Trey's investigation leads him to a survivor whose own family helped hide her abuse. Another survivor reveals evidence that may trace back to a top Jehovah's Witnesses leader. Victims get an overdue shot at justice in New York State.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Ransom
programme.desc: It began with a young mom abducted at gunpoint. Her family and veteran investigators spent desperate days trying to find out where she was but they never could have guessed who had her and why.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Somebody’s Daughter
programme.desc: Detectives often hit dead ends that can stop them cold but, for one young detective, dead ends were just another place to start. She'd beaten the odds in her own life. Now, she was determined to beat them on the job using her head and her heart.

programme.title: Movie: The Boss Baby
programme.desc: When Tim gets a younger brother, named The Boss Baby, he is suspicious of the suit-wearing baby. He discovers that his brother can talk, and is on a mission to investigate the CEO of Puppy Co. Together, they discover a plot to steal all the world's love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets Famous
programme.desc: Bart is launched into instant stardom with Krusty the Klown after wrecking the set.

programme.title: The Simpsons: All About Lisa
programme.desc: As Krusty's new assistant, Lisa steals the spotlight and gets her own show, leaving Krusty behind. Meanwhile, Bart and Homer spend some time bonding through their newfound love of coin collecting.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Faith Off
programme.desc: When Homer gets his head stuck in a bucket of glue, the family attempts to save him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa With An 'S"
programme.desc: When Homer loses $5,000 at a poker game with Broadway legend Laney Fontaine, the only way he is able to settle the bet is if he loans Lisa to Laney for a month.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Jazzy and the Pussycats
programme.desc: When Bart turns a quiet funeral into a chaotic mess, his parents are faced with a mob of angry Springfieldians who have had enough. Homer and Marge look to a child psychiatrist for help, who suggests that Bart take up drumming to channel his energy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Girl's in the Band
programme.desc: Lisa is scouted by the director of the Capitol City Philharmonic, to her band teacher's dismay. Homer works extra shifts at the plant so Lisa can play, putting strain on the family.

programme.title: Family Guy: Petey IV
programme.desc: On Thanksgiving weekend, Peter discovers an alternate ending in the Russian version of one of his favorite films and writes to Vladimir Putin, who comes to Quahog. Meanwhile, a strapped-for-cash Brian gets a job at a suicide hotline center.

programme.title: Family Guy: Crimes and Meg's Demeanor
programme.desc: Peter encourages Meg to attend a high school party, where she takes up drinking, which both concerns and delights her father. Meanwhile, Brian begins spying on his neighbors and suspects Principal Shepherd of a crime.

programme.title: Family Guy: Don't Be a Dickens at Christmas
programme.desc: A selfish Peter loses his Christmas spirit and is visited by ghosts of Christmas past, present and future who take him on a journey around Quahog in the style of Charles Dickens' 'A Christmas Carol.'

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)
programme.desc: At the vet's office, Brian meets a female show dog named Ellie. Smitten with her, he enters a show dog competition, in which the winner gets to breed with her.

programme.title: Movie: A Million Ways to Die in the West
programme.desc: A craven sheep farmer in the perilous Old West meets and falls for a mysterious new woman in town who helps him develop confidence, courage and shooting skills. His new bravery is put to the test when her outlaw husband rides into town and wants payback.

programme.title: Movie: The Maze Runner
programme.desc: A boy wakes up in an ascending elevator with no memory of who he is or how he got there. He joins a group of other boys trapped in an enclosed area surrounded by an enormous maze. His only hope for escape is by piecing together clues about his past.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hunger at Sea: Oceans
programme.desc: This episode follows blue whales, sharks, sea lions and dolphins to reveal the strategies they use to hunt for prey. The ocean is an immense wilderness; predators face an endless search to find and catch food, yet the ocean is home to remarkable hunters.

programme.title: The Hunt: Nowhere to Hide: Plains
programme.desc: The open arenas of grassland and desert make up half of all land on our planet. In these exposed habitats, predators like cheetahs, bald eagles and lions can usually see their prey. But it works both ways: their prey can see them too.

programme.title: The Hunt: Race Against Time: Coasts
programme.desc: The coast is the only place on the planet where predators from air, land and sea come together; powered by the tides and thrashed by waves, this is a world of continuous change. Opportunities never last long, so hunters are always in a race against time.

programme.title: The Hunt: The Hardest Challenge
programme.desc: The contests between predators and prey are the most dramatic events in nature. The premiere episode reveals the extraordinary range of techniques predators use to catch their prey.

programme.title: The Hunt: In the Grip of Seasons: Arctic
programme.desc: This episode looks at the challenges of hunting in the Arctic, the most seasonal place on Earth. To a predator, seasonal change is a problem; it means that all the parameters of the hunt change too.

programme.title: Seven Worlds, One Planet: Europe
programme.desc: Europe is where wildlife survives alongside people. In Gibraltar, a baby monkey is kidnapped, while in the cemeteries of Vienna grave robbing wild hamsters fight. In this fairy tale continent wolves roam the forests and dragons lurk in caves.

programme.title: The Hunt: Hide and Seek: Jungles

programme.title: What on Earth?: Ghost Town Terror
programme.desc: When satellites discover a strange abandoned city frozen in time, experts investigate what caused the people who lived here to disappear overnight. Using cutting-edge tech, they follow fresh leads to uncover if this mysterious city has a dark secret.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Monsters of the Milky Way
programme.desc: The center of the Milky Way is home to strange and deadly phenomena that we don't yet understand, but using the latest science, experts are revealing how the supermassive black hole our galaxy's core shapes life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: The Quasar Enigma
programme.desc: Quasars are the brightest and most powerful objects in our universe, and though they have shaped the cosmos, they might ultimately destroy everything that exists.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Mercury
programme.desc: Mercury is a deadly world, facing attacks from the Sun, comets, and other planets, and even though it's the smallest planet in our solar system, it has a dangerous secret a dangerous secret that might one day threaten life on Earth.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Comets - Frozen Wanderers
programme.desc: Follow the odyssey of a comet as it sails through space, watching every move as it evolves from a chunk of ice and rock into an active nucleus engulfed in a gaseous haze.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Alien Galaxies
programme.desc: The evolution of galaxies, from clouds of gas to magnificent spirals that fill our night.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Forces of Mass Construction
programme.desc: There's a mysterious force you can't see or touch, but it affects everything in the universe. Magnetism has shaped our cosmos, and without it, Creation would simply disintegrate. We follow scientists trying to understand how this strange force works.

programme.title: How the Universe Works: Secret History of Pluto
programme.desc: The first close-up images of Pluto revealed the unimaginable secrets of this mysterious frozen world. Now, scientists investigate if Pluto is home to a warm ocean of liquid water beneath its surface, and whether this underground ocean could harbor life.

programme.title: Secrets of the Underground: Mystery of the Serpent Mound
programme.desc: Rob explores mysterious tunnels beneath Denver's airport, the capitol building, and downtown to investigate rumors of a secret organization that operates below. In Ohio, he tries to uncover the ancient secrets of a giant mound shaped like a serpent.
